'''dangowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seaconny|seaconny]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seaconny|seaconny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dangowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dængeweth|dængeweth]] || [[word:dængewej|dængewej]] || [[word:dængewesh|dængewesh]] || [[word:dængewe|dængewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dangongowoth|dangongowoth]] || [[word:dangongowoj|dangongowoj]] || [[word:dangongowosh|dangongowosh]] || [[word:dangongowo|dangongowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dangowoth|dangowoth]] || [[word:dangowoj|dangowoj]] || [[word:dangowosh|dangowosh]] || [[word:dangowo|dangowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dangofwoth|dangofwoth]] || [[word:dangofwoj|dangofwoj]] || [[word:dangofwosh|dangofwosh]] || [[word:dangofwof|dangofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dangowotho|dangowotho]] || [[word:dangowojo|dangowojo]] || [[word:dangowosho|dangowosho]] || [[word:dangowoko|dangowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dangowoth|dangowoth]] || [[word:dangowoj|dangowoj]] || [[word:dangowosh|dangowosh]] || [[word:dangowo|dangowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dangowothol|dangowothol]] || [[word:dangowojol|dangowojol]] || [[word:dangowoshol|dangowoshol]] || [[word:dangowokol|dangowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dangowothotho|dangowothotho]] || [[word:dangowojojo|dangowojojo]] || [[word:dangowoshosho|dangowoshosho]] || [[word:dangowoko|dangowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dangowothon|dangowothon]] || [[word:dangowojon|dangowojon]] || [[word:dangowoshon|dangowoshon]] || [[word:dangowokon|dangowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dangowothoro|dangowothoro]] || [[word:dangowojoro|dangowojoro]] || [[word:dangowoshoro|dangowoshoro]] || [[word:dangowokoro|dangowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
